name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Zelenskyy meets with the exiled Crown Prince of Iran, Reza Pahlavi, to discuss regime change in Iran.

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: A federal judge has blocked subpoenas against Fed Chair Jerome Powell, citing "essentially zero evidence."

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: President Trump says if he could come back as anyone else in history to experience their life, he’d choose himself.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Trump says the special military option in Iran will end “when I feel it in my bones”
